user_query: Looking at the Mother's breakfast proposals for Day 1.. which of these three is the fastest to prep? I'm going to be in a rush.

selected_nodes.name: Cottage Cheese Bowl — Citrus Fresh Bowl
selected_nodes.short_description: Protein-packed cottage cheese bowl with pineapple and cinnamon for a tangy, tropical-inspired breakfast or snack.
selected_nodes.meal_suggestion: Cottage cheese bowl topped with pineapple and a light dusting of cinnamon. Enjoy as a quick high-protein breakfast or snack. For more fiber and staying power, add berries, chia seeds, or a small handful of nuts.
selected_nodes.nutrition_note: Protein-rich cottage cheese delivers satiety and calcium; pineapple contributes vitamin C and natural sweetness with modest sugars. Cinnamon adds aroma and may modestly aid blood sugar regulation.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 5 > Mother > Day 1 > Breakfast > Cottage Cheese Bowl — Citrus Fresh Bowl
selected_nodes.reasoning: Cottage Cheese Bowl — Citrus Fresh Bowl is essentially assembly only (spoon cottage cheese, top with pineapple and cinnamon). No cooking or blending required, so prep time is minimal.

selected_nodes.name: Smoothie — Sesame Twist
selected_nodes.short_description: Creamy banana oat smoothie with milk and peanut butter; protein- and fiber-rich, balanced and satisfying.
selected_nodes.meal_suggestion: Great as a quick breakfast or post-workout drink. To honor the Sesame Twist, top with sesame seeds or swirl in a small amount of tahini; optionally add a pinch of cinnamon or vanilla for extra aroma.
selected_nodes.nutrition_note: Balanced smoothie with carbohydrates from banana and oats, protein from milk and peanut butter, and healthy fats from peanut butter. Good source of calcium and potassium; can be calorie-dense, so adjust portions to fit your needs. For a Sesame Twist, consider topping with sesame seeds or swirling in a bit of tahini.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 5 > Mother > Day 1 > Breakfast > Smoothie — Sesame Twist
selected_nodes.reasoning: Smoothie — Sesame Twist is quick to prepare (combine ingredients and blend). Slightly longer than simple assembly but still very fast and portable for rushed mornings.
